executive_summary: The Typer-based Python CLI for iteration 000044 (PRD 003) is well-implemented. All four user stories are fully satisfied: all five generation commands exist under cli/commands/, --async mode correctly calls submit_job() and prints the expected queued message, the parallax jobs subcommand group covers all five sub-commands (list, status, watch, cancel, open), and the python -m parallax / uv run parallax entry points work correctly. All 78 tests pass. The only gap is in FR-3: PARALLAX_UV_PATH and PARALLAX_RUNTIME_DIR environment variables are not honoured by the Python CLI, whereas the TS CLI reads both.
minor_observations: cli/__main__.py docstring says 'python -m cli invocation' — should say 'python -m parallax invocation' for clarity, since the actual entry is parallax/__main__.py for the intended usage.

FR-3 gap: PARALLAX_UV_PATH env var is not read in cli/_async.py._uv_path(); shutil.which('uv') is used instead. PARALLAX_RUNTIME_DIR is not read either. Both are used by the TS CLI to override defaults.

cli/commands/upscale.py uses input: str = ... (Ellipsis as default) to mark it as required, which is unconventional for Typer — should use typer.Option(...) or make it a typer.Argument for positional use.
save_video_frames() PyAV fallback writes PNGs to a directory and returns a directory path instead of an MP4 path — callers should be aware the output path may change type.
No integration tests for the actual pipeline calls in sync mode (pipelines mocked); this is acceptable given the CPU-only CI constraint.
conclusions_and_recommendations: The CLI prototype is production-ready for all user stories. The only actionable gap is FR-3: add os.environ.get('PARALLAX_UV_PATH') support to cli/_async.py._uv_path() and os.environ.get('PARALLAX_RUNTIME_DIR') support to resolve the script_base in run_async(). The docstring fix in cli/__main__.py is cosmetic. The upscale input flag style is a minor style issue. All other items are observations only. Recommended refactor actions: (1) honour PARALLAX_UV_PATH in _uv_path(), (2) honour PARALLAX_RUNTIME_DIR in run_async() script_base resolution, (3) fix cli/__main__.py docstring.
